overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a science fiction video game showing a character exploring a futuristic medical clinic with teal walls and modern furnishings. The character walks through a waiting area and reception desk while following an NPC in an orange jacket.

large medical poster showing a human eye on the right wall

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a futuristic medical clinic waiting area with teal walls and tan leather couches. An NPC in an orange jacket enters through a doorway ahead, and the character follows toward the reception area.

segments.scene_description: The character enters the reception area featuring a curved counter with a seated staff member. The NPC in orange continues walking ahead as the character passes the desk, moving deeper into the clinic facility.

segments.scene_description: The character moves past the reception area toward the back of the clinic, approaching a doorway marked Medical Consultation. White filing cabinets and medical equipment line the right wall as the NPC ahead continues toward the back area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a futuristic medical clinic, transitioning from a public waiting area into the more private administrative and consultation zones. It begins by following an NPC in an orange jacket through a waiting room characterized by teal walls and tan leather couches. As the character pursues the NPC, the scene opens into a reception area featuring a curved counter and a seated staff member. The camera then moves past the desk and deeper into the facility, where the environment shifts toward a clinical workspace lined with white filing cabinets and medical equipment. Finally, the movement leads toward the back of the clinic, approaching a doorway marked Medical Consultation as the NPC continues ahead.
